message:
fix(tests): Remove unused imports and fix compiler warnings

- net_udp: Remove unused imports (SocketAddr, thread, Wake, Waker) and
  dead NoopWaker struct
- stream_e2e: Remove unused imports (LabConfig, LabRuntime, type aliases)
  and unnecessary mut bindings
- time_e2e: Remove unused imports (LabConfig, LabRuntime, sleep, sleep_until)
- common/mod.rs: Add #![allow(unused_imports)] for re-exported items
- pool_tests: Add #[allow(dead_code)] for test helpers, wrap comparison
  in allow block for usize >= 0
- src/net/udp.rs: Remove unused mut on Context variable
- repro_budget_time_confusion: Add module doc comment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
